specs.dimensions: Back: 19.5"W x 27"-32.25"H; Seat: 21"W x 17.5"-20.5"D; Seat height: 16"-20"; Overall height: 48"
specs.materials: Hardwood back frame, fabric upholstery, moulded foam seat and back, nylon base
key_features: Tilt tension with forward and back seat angle control
Available with standard or petite seat
specs.notes: 1240-3 is the High Back Multi-Tilter in Global's ObusForme Comfort series. Heavy-duty variant is TS1240-3. Finish/fabric list and warranty not captured from spec page loaded; exact fabric grade options would come from Global's spec sheet PDF (multiple upholstery grades typical for this line).
